detail.description: Colby Thomas singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Colby Thomas doubles (3) on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Nick Kurtz scores.
Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.
Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to shortstop Masyn Winn. Nick Kurtz to 3rd.
Colby Thomas doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Colby Thomas homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Colby Thomas singles on a pop up to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Colby Thomas singles on a line drive to left fielder Lane Thomas.
Colby Thomas singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler. Nick Kurtz scores. Lawrence Butler to 2nd.
Colby Thomas doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Darell Hernaiz scores. Nick Kurtz scores.
Colby Thomas singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Shea Langeliers scores. Brent Rooker to 2nd.
Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to third baseman Coby Mayo.
Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh.
Colby Thomas singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Evan Carter. Shea Langeliers scores. Nick Kurtz to 2nd.
Colby Thomas homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.
